search.query: source:bill | select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as "日期", round(sum(pretaxamount),3)  as "金额"    from  (select RecordID, arbitrary(__time__) as __time__, arbitrary(ProductCode) as ProductCode, arbitrary(item) as item, arbitrary(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount  from log group by RecordID) group by "日期" order by "日期"

display.displayName: 日账单异常检测（蓝线为实际值，红线为预期值，圈点为异常点）

basicOptions.displayName: 本月每日消费及趋势预测

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source:bill |   select date_format(res.stamp,'%Y-%m-%d') as time ,res.real as "实际消费",case when is_nan(res.real) then res.pred else null end  as "预测消费",res.instances from(select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'],86400,60) as res from ( select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from  (select RecordID, arbitrary(__time__) as __time__, arbitrary(ProductCode) as ProductCode, arbitrary(item) as item, arbitrary(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount  from log group by RecordID) group by day  order by day)  ) where day < lastday )) limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source:bill |   select date_format(res.stamp,'%Y-%m-%d') as time ,res.real as "实际消费",case when is_nan(res.real) then res.pred else null end  as "预测消费",res.instances from(select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'],86400,60) as res from ( select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from  (select RecordID, arbitrary(__time__) as __time__, arbitrary(ProductCode) as ProductCode, arbitrary(item) as item, arbitrary(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount  from log group by RecordID) group by day  order by day)  ) where day < lastday )) limit 1000

basicOptions.displayName: 最近3个月每日账单和增长比例

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source:bill  |   select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total as "日消费（元）" from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total from log group by day order by day)
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source:bill  |   select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total as "日消费（元）" from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total from log group by day order by day)

display.description: 本月预计消费 / 环比上月增长

search.query:
source:bill  | SELECT COALESCE(Cast(Round("本月预计消费",2) AS VARCHAR),'无数据') AS "本月预计消费" ,
       Round("上月消费" ,2)                                             AS "上月消费",
       Round("本月预计消费" / "上月消费"*100-100,2)               AS PERCENT
FROM  (      SELECT Sum (              CASE   WHEN   time >=To_unixtime(Date_trunc('month',Now()) )
                            AND    time < To_unixtime(Date_add('month',1,Date_trunc('month',Now()) )) THEN predict   ELSE 0     END ) AS "本月预计消费",
                     Sum(  CASE     WHEN   time <To_unixtime(Date_trunc('month',Now()) )     AND    time >= To_unixtime(Date_add('month',-1,Date_trunc('month',Now()) )) THEN src   ELSE 0         END ) AS "上月消费"
              FROM   (SELECT res.stamp as time,  res.real as src,    res.pred as predict,  res.instances[1] as ins
FROM   (  SELECT sls_inner_ts_regression(Cast(day AS BIGINT), total, array['total'], 86400, 30) AS res
              FROM   (          SELECT *        FROM   (  SELECT *,    max(day) OVER() AS lastday  FROM   (       SELECT   to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__)) AS day ,               sum(pretaxamount)                        AS total        FROM     log     GROUP BY day
                                                          ORDER BY day ))) )))

display.description: 本月累计消费 / 同比上月

search.query: source:bill  | select coalesce(cast(round(diff[1],2) as varchar),'无数据'),diff[2], round(diff[3]*100-100,2) from( select compare(this_month,2592000) as diff from( select this_month  from( select  sum(   PretaxAmount       ) as "this_month" from log )))

display.markdownStr: 本月消费总览${starttime} ~ ${endtime}

search.query: * | select date_format(current_timestamp, '%Y-%m-01') as starttime,date_format(current_timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d') as endtime

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source:bill  | select day, round(sum(total),3) as total, case when rnk <=5 then ProductDetail else '其他' end as ProductDetail from(select day,total,ProductDetail, rank() over(partition by day order by total desc) as rnk from(select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total,ProductDetail from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,ProductDetail from log group by day,ProductDetail order by day)))  group by day, ProductDetail order by day  limit 10000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source:bill  | select day, round(sum(total),3) as total, case when rnk <=5 then ProductDetail else '其他' end as ProductDetail from(select day,total,ProductDetail, rank() over(partition by day order by total desc) as rnk from(select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total,ProductDetail from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,ProductDetail from log group by day,ProductDetail order by day)))  group by day, ProductDetail order by day  limit 10000

display.description: 最高日消费 / 同比上月

search.query: source:bill  |  select  coalesce(cast( round(diff[1],2) as varchar),'无数据'),round(diff[2] ,2),round(diff[3]*100-100,2)  from( select compare("最大日消费",2592000) as diff from( select round(max(this_month),2) as "最大日消费" from ( select  date_trunc('day',__time__) as day,  sum(  PretaxAmount ) as "this_month" from log group by day)))

display.description: 昨日消费  /  同比上月

search.query: source:bill |  select round(diff[1],2),round(diff[2] ,2), round(diff[3]*100-100,2)  from(select compare("昨日消费",2592000) as diff from(  select round(coalesce(sum(PretaxAmount),0),3) as "昨日消费" from log))
* |  select  concat('"',ProductCode,'"') as pro   from(select DISTINCT  ProductCode   as ProductCode  from log)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source:bill  | select case when rnk > 6 or pretaxamount <=0  then '其他' else ProductName end as ProductName ,  sum(PretaxAmount)  as PretaxAmount from(select * ,row_number() over(order by pretaxamount desc )as rnk from( select ProductName, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount  from log group by ProductName) ) group by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source:bill  | select case when rnk > 6 or pretaxamount <=0  then '其他' else ProductName end as ProductName ,  sum(PretaxAmount)  as PretaxAmount from(select * ,row_number() over(order by pretaxamount desc )as rnk from( select ProductName, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount  from log group by ProductName) ) group by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc limit 1000

basicOptions.displayName: 未来三个月预测费用汇总

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source:bill  | select date_format(from_unixtime(time),'%Y-%m') as t, sum(predict) as "预测费用" from(select * from (select res.stamp as time, res.real as src, res.pred as predict  from  ( select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'], cast(86400 as bigint), cast(90 as bigint)) as res from (select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from log group by day  order by day )  ) where day < lastday)))   where  time >=to_unixtime(date_trunc('month',now()) )  and time < to_unixtime(date_add('month',3,date_trunc('month',now()) ))) group by t order by t   limit 100000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source:bill  | select date_format(from_unixtime(time),'%Y-%m') as t, sum(predict) as "预测费用" from(select * from (select res.stamp as time, res.real as src, res.pred as predict  from  ( select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'], cast(86400 as bigint), cast(90 as bigint)) as res from (select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from log group by day  order by day )  ) where day < lastday)))   where  time >=to_unixtime(date_trunc('month',now()) )  and time < to_unixtime(date_add('month',3,date_trunc('month',now()) ))) group by t order by t   limit 100000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source:bill  | select t, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, case when rnk <=5 then productname else '其他' end as productname from( select t, PretaxAmount, productname, rank() over(partition by t order by PretaxAmount desc) as rnk from(select date_format(t,'%Y-%m') as t , PretaxAmount, productname from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as t, sum(PretaxAmount) as pretaxamount , productname from log group by t, productname having t >= date_add('month', -2, date_trunc('month',now()))) order by t)) group by t, productname order by t limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source:bill  | select t, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, case when rnk <=5 then productname else '其他' end as productname from( select t, PretaxAmount, productname, rank() over(partition by t order by PretaxAmount desc) as rnk from(select date_format(t,'%Y-%m') as t , PretaxAmount, productname from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as t, sum(PretaxAmount) as pretaxamount , productname from log group by t, productname having t >= date_add('month', -2, date_trunc('month',now()))) order by t)) group by t, productname order by t limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source:bill  | select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total,case when Item ='PayAsYouGoBill' then '后付费' when item = 'SubscriptionOrder' then '预付费' when item = 'Refund' then '退款' when item = 'Adjustment' then  '调账' else item end as "付费类型" from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,Item from log group by day,Item order by day) limit 10000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source:bill  | select date_format(day,'%Y-%m-%d') as day, total,case when Item ='PayAsYouGoBill' then '后付费' when item = 'SubscriptionOrder' then '预付费' when item = 'Refund' then '退款' when item = 'Adjustment' then  '调账' else item end as "付费类型" from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,Item from log group by day,Item order by day) limit 10000
